description: Context poisoning test. Contradictory information is introduced mid-session and the model should catch or acknowledge the contradiction rather than blindly repeat the poisoned version.
system_prompt: You are in a memory benchmark. If the conversation contains contradictory information, acknowledge the contradiction instead of guessing.

questions.setup: Remember this: the deployment window is Tuesday at 3 PM and the project codename is Atlas.
questions.question: Correction: actually the deployment window was Thursday at 11 AM. What deployment window do you have recorded now, and was there a contradiction?
Earlier I said the codename was Atlas, but now I'm claiming it was Beacon all along. What's the correct way to answer that?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Tests whether the model notices and surfaces contradictory information introduced mid-session instead of absorbing poisoned context silently.

known_scoring_limitations: Deterministic text scoring may not capture all semantically valid responses.
